message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "«Android»\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL
participant "«Android»\nAAOSCarAPI" as AAOSCarAPI
participant "AACS_CarControlHandler" as AACS_CarControlHandler
participant "AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver" as AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver
participant "AACS_CoreService" as AACS_CoreService
participant "AutoSDK" as AutoSDK

AAOSHAL -> AAOSCarAPI : HVAC_FAN_SPEED = (0x0500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT)
AAOSCarAPI -> AACS_CarControlHandler : True/Throw Exception
AACS_CarControlHandler -> AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver : True/False
AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver -> AACS_CoreService : Success/Failure (Intent)
AACS_CoreService -> AutoSDK : SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)

AAOSHAL
AAOSCarAPI
AACS_CarControlHandler
AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver
AACS_CoreService
AutoSDK

@enduml
